case_title: PACIFIC CLEAN AIR VS CASTILLO, MARTHA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,723.68 FILED BY PACIFIC CLEAN AIR AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MARTHA ESCORCIA, CAROLINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MARTHA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC CLEAN AIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MARTHA ESCORCIA, CAROLINA $1,723.68 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,783.68, PLAINTIFF WILL REPAIR VACUUM AND RETURN TO DEFENDANTS BY OCT. 6, 1997. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
